name: atlas
description:
/atlas — wraps `hexa atlas` (the atlas SSOT surface). SSOT = `compiler/atlas/embedded.gen.hexa` (the binary-builtin atlas, ~16088 nodes), served at runtime by static_atlas via TEXT-parse of embedded.gen.hexa. Read verbs: hash · stats [--audit [--scope=rodata|overlay|merged] [--format=json]] · lookup [K] · lookup --prefix=

(K ∈ P|C|L|E|F|R|S|X|Q) · dump [K] [--json]. Write verb (ONE): register --from-verify (or 2-op) · register --from-drill --seed "" [--rounds N] [--engine mk9|mk10] — runs the verb in-process and on 🔵/🟢 folds the verified AtlasNode DIRECTLY into compiler/atlas/embedded.gen.hexa, visible to the next lookup with NO rebuild, NO staging shard, NO intermediate file; honest degrade — drill with verdict=skip registers nothing, verify FALSIFIED is rejected. Commit embedded.gen.hexa with normal git to share. Export verb (NEW): export [--out PATH] — writes the live atlas out as a portable `.n6` file (default n6/atlas.n6); n6/atlas.n6 is an export artifact only, NOT the runtime SSOT. NL trigger via skill ('atlas lookup', 'atlas stats', '아틀라스 조회', '아틀라스 등록', 'register from drill', 'atlas absorb').
